// NOTE: The following line is auto-generated by Atomic — do not edit this line!
// @atomic route=ws:{{NAME}} auth={{AUTH}} type=websocket

package main

import "github.com/gorilla/websocket"

// Ws{{NAME_UPPER}} is called for each new WebSocket connection.
// The connection is closed automatically when this function returns.
func Ws{{NAME_UPPER}}(conn *websocket.Conn) {
	for {
		messageType, message, err := conn.ReadMessage()
		if err != nil {
			return
		}
		if err := conn.WriteMessage(messageType, message); err != nil {
			return
		}
	}
}
